comment: Refreshed Theorem 3 drafts with explicit W/W-prime qualifiers after report-parser cleanup; other drafts preserved.

assumption_positive_recommendation_utili.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX draft refreshed from the current paper-facing statement surface.
assumption_positive_recommendation_utili.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} \to RecommendationModel m n \to Prop

assumption_theorem4_estimated_model_redu.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} \to EstimatedRecommendationModel m n \to ReductionWitness m n 3 \to Prop

assumption_theorem4_true_model_reduction.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} \to EstimatedRecommendationModel m n \to ReductionWitness m n 2 \to Prop

itemFairness.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
itemFairness.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero n] (W : RecommendationModel m n) (ρ : Policy m n) = EconCSLib.finiteMin (normalizedItemUtility W ρ)

itemNormalizer.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
itemNormalizer.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} (W : RecommendationModel m n) (j : Item n) = \sum u, W.utility u j

normalizedItemUtility.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
normalizedItemUtility.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} (W : RecommendationModel m n) (ρ : Policy m n) (j : Item n) = let denom = itemNormalizer W j if denom = 0 then 0 else rawItemUtility W ρ j / denom

normalizedUserUtility.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
normalizedUserUtility.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero n] (W : RecommendationModel m n) (ρ : Policy m n) (u : User m) = rawUserUtility W ρ u / RecommendationModel.bestItemUtility W u

priceOfFairness.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
priceOfFairness.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero m] [NeZero n] (W : RecommendationModel m n) = priceOfFairnessAt W 1

priceOfFairnessAt.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
priceOfFairnessAt.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero m] [NeZero n] (W : RecommendationModel m n) (\gamma : ℝ) = let base = RecommendationModel.optimalUserFairnessAtLevel W 0 if base = 0 then 0 else (base - RecommendationModel.optimalUserFairnessAtLevel W \gamma) / base

priceOfMisestimation.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
priceOfMisestimation.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero m] [NeZero n] (E : EstimatedRecommendationModel m n) (\gamma : ℝ) (ρhat : Policy m n) = let base = RecommendationModel.optimalUserFairnessAtLevel E.trueModel \gamma if base = 0 then 0 else (base - RecommendationModel.userFairness E.trueModel ρhat) / base

proposition1_symmetric_lp_reduction.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
proposition1_symmetric_lp_reduction.tex_statement: \forall {m n K : ℕ} [inst : NeZero m] [inst_1 : NeZero n] [NeZero K] (R : ReductionWitness m n K) (reps : TypeRepresentatives types) (\gamma : ℝ), LPReductionTarget R \gamma

proposition2_symmetric_optimum_exists.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
proposition2_symmetric_optimum_exists.tex_statement: \forall {m n K : ℕ} [inst : NeZero m] [inst_1 : NeZero n] [NeZero K] (S : SymmetricData m n K) (reps : TypeRepresentatives types), Positive \to \exists ρsym, IsTypeSymmetric types ρsym \land IsOptimalAtLevel 1 ρsym

rawItemUtility.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
rawItemUtility.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} (W : RecommendationModel m n) (ρ : Policy m n) (j : Item n) = \sum u, W.utility u j * (ρ u j).toReal

rawUserUtility.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
rawUserUtility.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} (W : RecommendationModel m n) (ρ : Policy m n) (u : User m) = EconCSLib.Policy.agentScore ρ W.utility u

recommendationUtility.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
recommendationUtility.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} (W : RecommendationModel m n) (u : User m) (j : Item n) = W.utility u j

solvesProblemOne.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
solvesProblemOne.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero m] [NeZero n] (W : RecommendationModel m n) (\gamma : ℝ) (ρ : Policy m n) = RecommendationModel.IsOptimalAtLevel W \gamma ρ

theorem3_price_decreases_first_half.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem3_price_decreases_first_half.tex_statement: For the opposing two-type source model with positive strictly decreasing item values and 0 < alpha <= alpha' <= 1/2, increasing alpha toward the balanced population weakly decreases the price of fairness.

theorem3_price_increases_second_half.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem3_price_increases_second_half.tex_statement: For the opposing two-type source model with positive strictly decreasing item values and 1/2 <= alpha <= alpha' < 1, increasing alpha away from the balanced population weakly increases the price of fairness.

theorem4_misestimation_tradeoff_typeOne.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem4_misestimation_tradeoff_typeOne.tex_statement: \forall {m n : ℕ} [inst : NeZero m] [inst_1 : NeZero n] (E : EstimatedRecommendationModel m n) (Rtrue : ReductionWitness m n 2) (Rest : ReductionWitness m n 3) (repsTrue : TypeRepresentatives types) (repsEst : TypeRepresentatives types) {beta eps : ℝ} (u : User m), 2 < n \to trueModel = model \to estimatedModel = model \to reduced = twoTypeReducedModel (1 / 2) (theorem4SmallValueVector eps) \to reduced = theorem4EstimatedReducedModel beta (theorem4SmallValueVector eps) \to (\forall (u : User m), toType u = 0 \to toType u = 0) \to (\forall (u : User m), toType u = 1 \to toType u = 1) \to toType u = 1 \to toType u = 2 \to 0 < eps \to (↑n)⁻¹ < beta \to beta < 1 / 2 \to (have ρ0 := theorem4NoFairnessPolicyCollapsed (theorem4SmallValueVector eps); SolvesEstimatedProblem 0 (liftedPolicy ρ0) \land priceOfMisestimation 0 (liftedPolicy ρ0) \le 1 / 2) \land \exists ρ1, SolvesEstimatedProblem 1 (liftedPolicy ρ1) \land 1 - eps < priceOfMisestimation 1 (liftedPolicy ρ1)

theorem4_misestimation_tradeoff_typeZero.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem4_misestimation_tradeoff_typeZero.tex_statement: \forall {m n : ℕ} [inst : NeZero m] [inst_1 : NeZero n] (E : EstimatedRecommendationModel m n) (Rtrue : ReductionWitness m n 2) (Rest : ReductionWitness m n 3) (repsTrue : TypeRepresentatives types) (repsEst : TypeRepresentatives types) {beta eps : ℝ} (u : User m), 2 < n \to trueModel = model \to estimatedModel = model \to reduced = twoTypeReducedModel (1 / 2) (theorem4SmallValueVector eps) \to reduced = theorem4EstimatedReducedModel beta (theorem4SmallValueVector eps) \to (\forall (u : User m), toType u = 0 \to toType u = 0) \to (\forall (u : User m), toType u = 1 \to toType u = 1) \to toType u = 0 \to toType u = 2 \to 0 < eps \to (↑n)⁻¹ < beta \to beta < 1 / 2 \to (have ρ0 := theorem4NoFairnessPolicyCollapsed (theorem4SmallValueVector eps); SolvesEstimatedProblem 0 (liftedPolicy ρ0) \land priceOfMisestimation 0 (liftedPolicy ρ0) \le 1 / 2) \land \exists ρ1, SolvesEstimatedProblem 1 (liftedPolicy ρ1) \land 1 - eps < priceOfMisestimation 1 (liftedPolicy ρ1)

userFairness.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
userFairness.tex_statement: {m n : ℕ} [NeZero m] [NeZero n] (W : RecommendationModel m n) (ρ : Policy m n) = EconCSLib.finiteMin (normalizedUserUtility W ρ)

prompt_summary: Translate each Lean declaration from the Lean statement alone, with no paper context.
Preserve every visible variable, binder, hypothesis, domain condition, equivalence or implication direction, and conclusion.
Do not replace formulas with theorem labels, informal endpoints, or proof-route summaries.
